name: Talked to insurance adjuster after work fall—did I mess up?
description: Yes, lawyer up immediately—don't talk more.[2]

mainEntity.name: Talked to insurance adjuster after work fall—did I mess up?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, lawyer up immediately—don't talk more.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Possibly; they record to deny—stop talking without lawyer.** Statements twist against you.[1][2] Request all in writing now. Attorney negotiates, prevents low offers. Common mistake; recoverable with pro help.
